## FDE Evidence

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when UI or route behavior changed
- [ ] `npm run container:build` when runtime, dependency, or Docker behavior changed
- [ ] Contracts regenerated with `npm run contracts:sync` when schemas changed
- [ ] Docs and `docs/FDE_GATES.md` updated for any public claim change
